title: Pink pajama teddy — nose repair and restuff
description: This bedtime teddy needed nose work and new stuffing. We deep cleaned, restuffed, and repaired the nose for a neat, cuddly finish.
itemDetails: A teddy in pink pajamas is a bedtime-themed gift plush style that became especially common in department and card retail channels from the late 1990s onward. Pajama bears are often seasonal or occasion-linked (new baby, get well, bedtime gift). Construction usually combines polyester plush body fabric with stitched textile pajama garments and soft internal fill.
repairDetails: This teddy in pink pajamas had a damaged nose and flat stuffing. We deep cleaned the plush, restuffed the body, and repaired the nose so the face looks right again.
